test.failureSummary: 11 tests failed - 6 in CoverageOverlay.test.jsx, 1 in CameraView.test.jsx. Issues with mock setup and canvas dimension assertions.

blockingIssues.description: Variable 'mockCanvasElement' is assigned but never declared with 'let' or 'const' in CoverageOverlay.test.jsx line 37. This causes all 22 tests to fail with ReferenceError.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add reminder about variable declarations in test files - workers should verify test files have no ReferenceError issues before completing handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: coverage-overlay feature had a test file where 'mockCanvasElement' was assigned without declaration, causing all 22 tests to fail. The worker handoff claimed 16 passing tests, but the actual state had all tests failing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the preferred import style for internal project modules. Some components use relative imports (../../) while others use path aliases (@/). Standardize on @/ for consistency.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: CameraView component uses relative imports '../../hooks/useObjectDetection' instead of the @/ path alias convention documented in AGENTS.md.

camera-camera-view.summary: Well-implemented CameraView component with 27 comprehensive tests, proper error handling, and integration with CoverageOverlay.

coverage-overlay.summary: Component implementation is high-quality but tests are broken due to missing variable declaration. All 22 tests fail with ReferenceError.

dashboard-component.summary: Dashboard component excellently implemented with useMemo optimization, 23 comprehensive tests, and proper integration.

policy-selector.summary: PolicySelector component with excellent 27 test coverage, 'Red Moment' feature, accessibility, and proper integration.

tab-navigation.summary: TabNavigation component with 47 total tests (27 unit + 20 integration), proper accessibility, and responsive design.
